docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE RIAD SADEQ (TRANSACTION ID # 100023799) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-07-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-07-2017 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SADEQ, RIAD SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-20-2016

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-07-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
